creator: clutton@zoho.com
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #7)


cc -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D_REVISION=0  -I/usr/local/include   -DHAVE_PCRE -fstack-protector -msse2 -pthread -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D_REVISION=0  -I/usr/local/include   -DHAVE_PCRE -fstack-protector -Iinclude -msse2 -pthread -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D_REVISION=0  -I/usr/local/include   -DHAVE_PCRE -fstack-protector -fPIC -I..  -msse2 -pthread -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D_REVISION=0  -I/usr/local/include   -DHAVE_PCRE -fstack-protector -fPIC -I..    -c -o freebsd.o freebsd.c


There are some recursion, as you can see, which causes the wrong header inclusion for me.
